title: Freemium Subscription System with Stripe
description: Implement the subscription system for PhotoBuddy's freemium model. Integrate Stripe for payment processing. Create subscription tiers (Free, Pro at $10/month). Build subscription management UI showing current plan and upgrade options. Implement Stripe webhooks for subscription lifecycle events (created, updated, cancelled, payment failed). Enforce tier-based limits throughout app (upload limits, AI analysis limits). Create billing history page. Out of scope: annual plans, team plans, refunds handling.
